phoneticUs: 藞s忙l蓹s瑟藢le瑟t; s蓹藞l瑟s蓹藢le瑟t; 藢s忙l蓹藞s瑟l瑟t
examples: Approximately 30 compounds including methyl salicylate have been identified in the aroma of green tea.
Manganese salicylate was synthesized with the rheological phase reaction method.
Some cases of accidental overdose of methyl salicylate and camphor have been fatal.
